use_codes.desc: USE OF A CALCIPOTRIENE CONTAINING FOAM FOR THE TREATMENT OF PSORIASIS
USE OF CALCIPOTRIENE FOAM FOR THE TOPICAL TREATMENT OF PLAQUE PSORIASIS IN PATIENTS AGED 18 YEARS AND OLDER
USE OF CALCIPOTRIENE FOAM FOR THE TOPICAL TREATMENT OF PLAQUE PSORIASIS IN PATIENTS AGED 4 YEARS AND OLDER

indications.text:
SORILUX Foam is indicated for the topical treatment of plaque psoriasis of the scalp and body
in patients 12 years and older.
